title: BlueHud
description: Enhance Your Gaming Experience with a Splash of Blue!
body:
Transform your Heads-Up Display (HUD) with BlueHud, the ultimate texture pack that infuses your interface with a sleek and calming blue aesthetic. With BlueHud, your gaming experience will not only look refreshing but also provide a visually pleasing environment to dive into.

**Features:**

- **Blue Health and Armor:** Both your hearts and armor icons are now a soothing shade of blue, giving your HUD a uniform look.

- **Disappearing Empty Icons:** Experience a cleaner HUD as empty hearts and hunger icons gracefully fade away, allowing you to focus on what's important.

- **Selected Slot Highlight:** Easily spot your selected slot with a distinct blue highlight, ensuring you never lose track in the heat of the moment.

- **Blue Experience Bar:** Leveling up has never looked cooler with a stylish blue experience bar to track your progress.

Enhance your gameplay with BlueHud and immerse yourself in a visually harmonious experience. Perfect for players who crave a subtle yet impactful upgrade to their interface!
